creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
Hi,

If I take a look at the pkg build server of aarch64 things are broken.
http://thunderx1.nyi.freebsd.org/

- head-arm64-default is already broken for a couple of weeks, because it can't build 'pkg' [1]
- 113arm64-quarterly stays in 'parallel_build' while all cpu's are idle.

Is there maintenance being done? Where should I report this?

Regards,
Ronald.

NB: I can't select "Package Infrastructure" as component.

[1] Log ends in:
install  -m 0644 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/pkg-1.13.2/NEWS /wrkdirs/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/pkg/NEWS
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
Bad system call
